verses.text: Topa in Zion-ah eite hong ciahpih kik ciangin i mang tawh kibang liang hi
Lungdamin i nui a, lungdam lua-in la i sa hi. Tua ciangin minam dangte kiho-in, “ Topa in amau-a' dingin na lianpite bawl khinta hi,” kici uh hi
Topa in eite-a' dingin na lianpite bawl khinta a, eite i kipak hi
Topa aw, lei keuna munah guah in tui a puak bangin kote' nopsaknate a ngei hong bangsakkik ta in
Khitui tawh khai a tuhte lungdamin kikona tawh an la sak ta in
Kap kawmin kuankhia-in a tuh ding khaici a pua mi lungdamin kikona tawh buhlomte pua-in hong ciah ding hi.
